description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a rich, medium-brown wood grain finish and a vertical, boxy profile. The front face features six evenly spaced open shelves, each with a recessed design, providing ample storage or display space. The sides and back are solid panels with the same wood grain pattern, and there are no visible handles, doors, or decorative elements. The surface appears smooth with subtle natural wood markings and a matte finish. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and designed for freestanding use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or public waiting areas. The open shelf design makes it suitable for storing books, documents, or decorative items.
description: A tall, rectangular wooden shelving unit with six open, recessed shelves and a smooth, matte wood grain finish. The sides and back are solid, giving it a sturdy, freestanding appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing a solid wood grain panel with no openings or shelves visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying six open, recessed shelves stacked vertically within a rectangular frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing a solid wood grain panel.
description_view_3: Rear view with a solid wood grain panel, no shelves or openings visible.
